library.title: Local Anime Library
library.libraryPathHelp: Path of the directory where your media files are located. (Keep formatting consistent)
library.additionalDirectoriesHelp: Include additional directory paths if your library is spread across multiple locations.
library.autoScanMoreHelp: When adding batches, not all files are guaranteed to be detected.
library.scannerConfigHelp: Configure advanced scanner rules in JSON format. This allows you to define custom matching and hydration rules for your library.
library.scannerMatchingAlgorithmHelp: The algorithm used to match anime files.
library.scannerUseLegacyMatchingHelp: Enable to use the legacy matching algorithms. (Versions 3.4 and below)
library.scannerUseLegacyMatchingMoreHelp: The legacy matching algorithm uses simpler methods that may be less accurate.
library.scannerMatchingThresholdHelp: The matching threshold for matching anime files.
library.includeOnlineStreamingInLibraryHelp: Add undownloaded shows that are on your 'Currently Watching' list to the library.
